step.name: enumerate-fixtures
step.action: List required fixtures: api_client, authenticated_client, admin_client, factory-derived data, reference-data fixtures.

step.name: pick-db-fixture
step.input: Per-fixture data shape + signals + transaction usage.
step.action: Set db_fixture: "none" for non-DB clients; "db" for default; "transactional_db" when on_commit / signals / select_for_update are asserted.
step.decision-gate: Reject db_fixture=db on a fixture whose name suggests signals.

step.name: pick-scope
step.action: Function scope for mutable / per-test data. Module scope for data shared across one file. Session scope ONLY for immutable static reference data.

step.name: declare-settings-overrides
step.action: DATABASES=sqlite in-memory (or test_postgres for CI), PASSWORD_HASHERS=MD5, EMAIL_BACKEND=locmem, CELERY_TASK_ALWAYS_EAGER=true, MEDIA_ROOT_per_test=true via autouse tmp_path fixture.

step.name: configure-xdist-and-validate
step.action: Enable xdist; document cold_start --create-db and warm-run --reuse-db. Emit spec; run validator.
